atomicity.message: The staged diff is one COS scaffold-package unit: internal route constants, tests, and the Claude orchestrator skill package templates plus required root template mirrors. It does not wire public route behavior, CLI/TUI surfaces, or runtime generation behavior.

conditions.message: BrightOwl passed this judgment cell for the staged COS skill-package payload.
evidence: BrightOwl inspected SKILL.md.tmpl and confirmed the core rule says coordinate evidence flow and do not manufacture evidence; quick start requires hash-bound verifier packets before gate/commit.

evidence: git diff --cached --name-status lists Go scaffold/tests and Markdown/Python template files only.

conditions.message: The staged payload adds template resources and contract tests plus helper scripts not wired into runtime paths; it introduces no hot path, benchmarked path, service loop, or declared performance budget surface.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh passed this mechanical cell for the staged COS skill-package payload.
evidence: ScarletMarsh confirmed SKILL.md.tmpl states the core rule: coordinate evidence flow; do not manufacture evidence; keep one atomic payload per gated commit; terminal wakes route attention only and are never verifier verdicts.

ScarletMarsh confirmed the staged skill quick start requires reading AGENTS.md/ORCHESTRATOR.md, reserving files, generating hash-bound verifier packets, gating/committing/pushing only after evidence, and releasing reservations/waking the next owner.
ScarletMarsh confirmed decision tables require holds on staged hash changes, shared judgment-cell disagreement, unowned staged paths, and missing/invalid attestations.
ScarletMarsh confirmed helper scripts preserve explicit control: pane wake requires --execute, append finding requires --write, attestation summary is read-only.
